headline: Live Nation (LYV) Brings Lowe’s 30 Million Loyalty Members Into Its Concert Amphitheaters
summary: Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (NYSE:LYV) is one of the best growth stocks to buy according to billionaire Dan Loeb. On June 11, home improvement retailer Lowe’s announced a new multi-year partnership with Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (NYSE:LYV) through which Lowe’s loyalty members will gain exclusive concert perks and experiences at Live Nation amphitheaters across the […]
